ui_begin.tooltip: Initialize the UI animation module and bind the TFT screen

ui_welcome.tooltip: Play startup animation: rainbow bar + power animation (need to be set first) + text display

ui_walk_init.message0: Walking Animation Initialization X %1 Y %2 Width %3 High %4 Spacing ms %5
ui_walk_init.tooltip: Initialize walking sprite animation and create Sprite buffer

ui_walk_frames.message0: Walking animation set frame data Array name %1 Frame number %2 Source width %3 Source height %4
ui_walk_frames.tooltip: Set the frame data array of the walking animation (need to be used with the img header file)

ui_walk_update.tooltip: Called in loop to automatically update walking animation frames

ui_strength_init.message0: Power Animation Initialization X %1 Y %2 Width %3 High %4
ui_strength_init.tooltip: Initialize the position and size of the power display animation

ui_strength_frames.message0: Power animation set frame data array name %1 frame number %2
ui_strength_frames.tooltip: Set the frame data array of the force animation

ui_strength_play.message0: Power animation play loop %1 times interval %2 ms

ui_set_fg_color.tooltip: Set the foreground color of U8g2 Chinese text

ui_print_cn.tooltip: Output Chinese text at specified coordinates (using the set font and foreground color)

ui_draw_bg.message0: Draw the night sky background X %1 Y %2 Width %3 High %4
ui_draw_bg.tooltip: Draw the night sky gradient background (dark blue → black)

ui_draw_stars.tooltip: Draw random star points on the background

ui_btn_add.tooltip: Register a button to the specified pin (automatically set to INPUT_PULLUP)

ui_btn_scan.tooltip: Scan all registered button states (including debounce)

ui_btn_pressed.tooltip: Detect whether the specified button has just been pressed (edge triggered)

ui_btn_is_pressed.tooltip: Detect whether the specified button is currently pressed (level trigger)

ui_page_count.tooltip: Set the total number of pages (for circular navigation)

ui_page_current.tooltip: Get the current page number (starting from 0)

ui_page_changed.tooltip: Determine whether the page has just changed

ui_page_next.tooltip: Switch to the next page (loop to the end and back to the beginning)

ui_page_prev.tooltip: Switch to the previous page (loop to the beginning and back to the end)

ui_page_set.tooltip: Directly set the current page number
